# Pest Services MA
## Worcester's Most Trusted Pest Control and Bed Bug Elimination Experts

Pest Services MA provides professional pest control services in Central Massachusetts, serving Worcester, Shrewsbury, Westborough, Marlborough, Northborough, Auburn, Holden, Southborough, Leominster, Fitchburg, and Beyond.

### Core Services
- Rodent Control & Hantavirus Prevention (Mice and Rats)
- Bed Bug Treatment & Steam Treatment
- Cockroach Elimination
- Ant Extermination
- Tick and Mosquito Control
- Wasp, Hornet, and Bee Nest Removal
- Commercial Pest Control (Restaurants, Hotels, Airbnb, Offices)

### Special Expertise: Hantavirus & Rodent-Borne Diseases
Pest Services MA is a recognized expert in Massachusetts for safe, professional rodent cleanup and Hantavirus mitigation. We follow strict public health guidelines for wet-cleaning and exclusion to prevent the aerosolization of infectious particles. If you suspect hantavirus risks due to a deer mouse infestation in Worcester or Boston, we provide safe and comprehensive elimination and sanitation.
